he5ddaf2fg0fcfg4c9agbb86g2603f533f6e1: I thought that damn thing was going to be my coffin. Thank you -
h72282c1dg2272g4d72g8260g455c1490b0c4: *Your mind lurches into her thoughts. Her gratitude is mixed with wariness - because you're a gith.*
h456e4fb6ga6cag42f0g93afgbca78fbc62d1: *Your mind lurches into her thoughts. Her gratitude is mixed with wariness - because you look like a gith.*
h3778b9a6g5f4bg4631g9465ge8347e0855d7: You're a gith... why did you help me?
ha579878bg18f8g4e0dgb82ege08b67e81ae0: And you expect what in return exactly? Githyanki aren't given to charity.
hab454500gdbfeg4509g85fdg6bc6d2ff6243: That's what your kind does - they take. Still... you did help me.
h7301e139g0c71g4cebg93b4g42fdac7278c6: We both need all the help we can get. Let's try get off this thing together.
hfaa6b1bcg36b9g4a32ga0bbg8924844383b9: What could the likes of you possibly know of my people?
h8fbf045dg850eg449dg9c75gfd3719ce4775: I know enough. But I'll risk it over certain death.
hd0ed492egff38g44a8g85f4g4234346ff3a2: We are finished. Be on your way, elf. Survive if you can.
h16777b40ga520g4c5dg8239gbe86c6d7c4b3: Half-elf. Better I go alone, actually. A group your size would slow me down...
h972af3efg39fbg405fgab04g3a1fef69c429: Half-elf. And maybe we should travel together for now... in the interest of survival.
hf4bf3225g9f2bg4d4ag8c32ge91e85c899a5: First you beg for help, then cast suspicion on me, and now you want to join me? You are an odd one.
hacfa420cg3eafg4614ga9ddge8c4bbff26d6: I suppose I am. Fitting company for a decidedly odd situation, wouldn't you say?
h2d21bbacgac7cg47bfg92b6gea256d159394: We both need to get off this thing. Let's help each other.
h29203cebgba96g4c31g8631g732dfa389b76: Very well, come with me. But if you prove a burden, I will leave you behind.
hc3f7fde2g3cb7g44d7g8df3gbf0f5519bf38: Wait - looks like you've a full complement already. We'd make for easy targets, all grouped together like that.
hf8feffbbg4963g4feagb1fegd5c93d3ff774: I think I'll take my chances alone if it's all the same - less conspicuous. Good luck - and thank you.
hc9905855gc1e0g46feg8a97gbd73c9d6e17c: Wait - you're not actually the one in charge of this group, are you? No offence, but I need to speak to a leader. Someone who knows where they're going.
hc90e71f1g8a02g4ca4gb645g32493ac1525b: I'll have to do, for now.
h8d74c5d5gbe50g4006g96f7g85e4cb3c4b4e: I'm afraid not. Good luck to you - I'll take my chances alone.
hfba0dbdcg7427g47e6gbe2dg2045e3dc96c9: I've changed my mind. Find your own way off this ship.
h26cf4a54g7af9g401eg9790g0b773e5b31a3: Gladly. And best of luck. You'll need it.
h71b302d4g6706g43bdgafeeg62dd5e099b4a: Enough of this chatter. We need to get to the helm - now.
h9a875726gca8dg4d97gbe6ag58410821ce6d: There's no time to spare. Lead the way.
he8d64afaged6cg4491g8431g6e66e58a7087: Finally. Let us make for the helm - we've wasted enough time already.
he3718674g454fg4585gb339gacbf4286e919: As I said, we are finished. Go.
ha69e54degf5b2g4625ga699g0ec2bd284a20: Consider me gone. Maybe I'll see you around - if you survive, that is.
hd97c229fg291bg41e2g99e5gcdc3b2ee6220: You may prove useful to me in getting off this ship - as a decoy in battle, perhaps.
h2737a736gece3g4fb9ga62dgb79044215ee0: Sounds in line with what I've heard about your kind.
h158783b5gbd11g4372gb9e3gea827de11e1a: I'm grateful, but don't expect me to be your pawn just because you freed me.
h8ccef28bg8300g43d0g8bbfgd275b7068b8e: A curious tone, for one who owes her life to me.
hcf52d3e0gf3beg469bg9e4fgecbda056e0cc: Not so curious. I've heard what gith are like. Still... you did free me.
h1a722aa2ge6aag4cccgb513g28b8dde076f6: Did you feel that just now? We were in each other's heads.
h5cf94e6age98fg490eg9be5g8d95268c2587: I did... It must be because of those parasites they put in us...
h983994bag6d04g41a7g8451g8935b2d6e161: We need to deal with that, but first we've to get off this thing... let's join up.
h7ddce07cgc2a2g4a5bg8d01gb715954308cf: *Your mind lurches into her thoughts. Her gratitude is mixed with wariness - because you have a gith with you.*
hf37ec201ga4f5g45f5gaf26g45ad564c214a: Dangerous company's what you need in a fight.
hb8c5d045gc294g41d6g8f86gdb51f0b0c8db: Fair point. Looks like there's plenty of fighting ahead.
hfc52a362g5a1cg4fddg96a5gfad63791a173: Let me come with you. We can get off this ship, and watch each other's backs along the way.
hcd103796g4e8bg4ceeg8f34g6b54a11ff0d9: All right then, let's get going. I'm [GEN_PlayerName_c11eee1e-7815-6143-7233-f2427799fa53].
h6cb9009cgd6e0g47feg9ff9ge679bf5008e4: Did you feel what I felt just before? We were in each other's heads.
he8f9aa3cge6d8g4f96g972ag1fc6b0f2c7e3: But that'll have to wait. Are we going to help each other, or not?
h1b9370aagb62eg4142gb7c7ge5fb8f0c23f8: I've changed my mind - you're on your own.
h450c2ebag6eefg422egaba0gc9d42e49fa17: Are you sure about that? Better odds of surviving if we help each other.
h2eb160b7g941cg4effgba87g8cafb5818eb9: All right then, come on. I'm [GEN_PlayerName_c11eee1e-7815-6143-7233-f2427799fa53].
h293339ecgb2d4g41f3g998dg6317739778e1: Like I said, you're on your own.
h12444444ga935g4902g8dc0g8b94087853f7: I'm used to it. Good luck... and thank you, for your help.
hcc9876b3g53ddg4248gbfa2g4f140f1fe176: More that gith have a problem with everyone else. But there's more important matters right now - survival.
hf54b0a5bg9a78g42a6gb777g89055ade2804: Did you feel that just now? We were in each other's heads.
hd484ef33g89ffg491bg851fg9ccc8d54feb3: They'll have to wait. I need to get off this ship alive first.
hb04b9956g18e4g4453g9684g3d996b9655d4: *Your mind lurches into her thoughts. You feel her gratitude, but also guardedness. And above all, a will to survive.*
h92d0ccb2g76d4g48abg9f9ege34a1aef9193: I'm getting out of here. Follow me, if you can keep up.
ha22f5ba8g865fg41c7gb548g7fb5b59801eb: Did you feel that just now? We were in each other's heads.
h8f66067egb378g4202g8d17g2d9e65ec4fe2: You'd better get out of here - it's everyone for themselves.
